Preterit.turoyo: mṭawṭaḥle ruḥe b-i=kow-áyo-wa laltaḥ b-aq=qayse qṭilole i=aṯto hayo-ste w-mḥalaqqe a=tre mṭawṭḥənne bayn u=talg-awo mḥalqənnelarwal
translations:
da
			liess er sich durch diese Dachluke hinab

‘He
			(the husband, m.) killed his wife with a club, and they (husband
			and his acquaintance) threw the two bodies (of wife and her lover)
			outside, in the snow’ LuF 282/27;

so
			warf er denn Steine nach ihm und vertrieb ihn (vom Grabe)
